'''Terman Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Terman system/Legends|Terman system]] of the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], between [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] and [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] along the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]].<ref name="Secrets">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref>

Terman Station was ancient, and in fact was a [[Xim's empire|Tionese]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] fortress dating to the wars between the [[Hutt Empire]] and [[Xim/Legends|Xim]] before the founding of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Despite this, it had been maintained and upgraded over the millennia.<ref name="Secrets" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the station administrator was [[Kilon Tarlok]]. It was also the center of [[Kalna]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] small scale protection racket. Hutt [[Expansionist Period/Legends|Expansionist Era]] [[kucha-sculpts]] were visible in one part of the station, obscured by [[Slickplast/Legends|slickplast]] posters. Around the same time, the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] academic [[Kinsa Doroturo]] hoped to reactivate the station's forgotten weapon systems, buried beneath layers and layers of more modern expansions. Doroturo's efforts, which would have caused the destruction of the station, were stymied by adventurers unknowingly working for [[Sprax]], the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]].<ref name="Secrets" />
